repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform_v1: fixed-overlap/product-rate common-EIF equivalence sanity theorem

published_prior_art.cite: ChernozhukovEtAl2018ECTJ + ChernozhukovNeweySingh2022ADML + Newey1994Econometrica: common EIF/product-rate first-order validity
none; closest papers give sufficient DML/LRO/ADML or one-good-nuisance results but not a necessary-and-sufficient three-report pseudo-truth partition

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dml_orth_uniform_v1 and v2 rejected angle0/angle1: finite-support witnesses for studentization or LRO separation, not for pseudo-truth compatibility-cone non-rectangularity

published_prior_art.cite: none; AtheyImbensWager2018JRSSB covers balancing/overlap geometry, not DML/LRO/ADML pseudo-truth validity cells

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed iff condition controls deterministic numerator drift only; the locked equivalence notion includes equality of the studentized Wald law under named variance reports, but no separate variance-report ratio/drift condition is defined.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: ADML is defined with the same AIPW summand and variance functional as DML while the automatic Riesz normal equations are not stated; as written the strict ADML-valid versus DML-valid cell is under-specified.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add report-specific variance-report drift objects, e.g. S_m(g,a), and make Conjecture 1 require both numerator drift cancellation and variance-ratio convergence for the named Wald reports.
Define the ADML Riesz pseudo-truth by its own finite-support normal equations, separate from the propensity-logit gamma map, and state exactly how h_a enters ADML but not DML.
Add a small J<=4 rational witness template with positive residual variances showing non-rectangularity and a report switch once the variance-report condition is included.

recommended_next_step: Revise §6 and §8 to separate estimator drift from variance-report drift and to pin ADML's Riesz pseudo-truth equations before re-review.
